languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, Мастер Дисциплины докладывает о волнениях в районе Сектора Бионика". {n}В словах Вигдис слышится тщательно скрываемое беспокойство.{/n} "Чернь с нижних палуб перекрыла входы, требуя вашего визита".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, Мастер Дисциплины докладывает о волнениях в районе Сектора Бионика". {n}В словах Вигдис слышится тщательно скрываемое беспокойство.{/n} "Чернь с нижних палуб перекрыла входы, требуя вашего визита".

languages.text: "Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, Мастер Дисциплины докладывает о волнениях в районе Сектора Бионика". {n}В словах Вигдис слышится тщательно скрываемое беспокойство.{/n} "Чернь с нижних палуб перекрыла входы, требуя вашего визита".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."

"Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."

"Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."

languages.text: 「ロード・キャプテン、マスター・アット・アームズより、セクター・ビオニカ付近で騒擾が起きたとの報告がありました。」{n}ヴォックス・マスターの声には、巧みに押し隠された不安がにじんでいる。{/n}「下層甲板の暴徒どもが出口を塞ぎ、あなたが彼らの前に姿を見せるよう要求しています。」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."

traits.locale_text: 「ロード・キャプテン、マスター・アット・アームズより、セクター・ビオニカ付近で騒擾が起きたとの報告がありました。」{n}ヴォックス・マスターの声には、巧みに押し隠された不安がにじんでいる。{/n}「下層甲板の暴徒どもが出口を塞ぎ、あなたが彼らの前に姿を見せるよう要求しています。」

languages.text: "Silahtar, Sektör Biyonika civarında huzursuzluklar olduğunu bildirdi Lord Kaptan." {n}Voks Üstadı'nın sesindeki incelikle gizlenmiş huzursuzluğu fark ediyorsun.{/n} "Alt güvertelerden gelen ayaktakımı, çıkışları kapatmış. Onlarla görüşmenizi talep ediyorlar."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."

traits.locale_text: "Silahtar, Sektör Biyonika civarında huzursuzluklar olduğunu bildirdi Lord Kaptan." {n}Voks Üstadı'nın sesindeki incelikle gizlenmiş huzursuzluğu fark ediyorsun.{/n} "Alt güvertelerden gelen ayaktakımı, çıkışları kapatmış. Onlarla görüşmenizi talep ediyorlar."

languages.text: “舰长大人，戒律大师上报仿生区周边发生骚乱。”{n}音阵大师声音中精心掩饰的不安隐约可辨。{/n}“下层甲板的贱民堵住了各个出口，执意要求您亲自现身。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，戒律大师上报仿生区周边发生骚乱。”{n}音阵大师声音中精心掩饰的不安隐约可辨。{/n}“下层甲板的贱民堵住了各个出口，执意要求您亲自现身。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain, der Master-at-Arms hat Störungen in der Umgebung von Sektor Bionica gemeldet." {n}Du hörst ein taktvoll verborgenes Unbehagen in der Stimme der Voxmeisterin.{/n} "Das Gesindel der unteren Decks hat die Ausgänge blockiert und verlangt Euer Kommen."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, der Master-at-Arms hat Störungen in der Umgebung von Sektor Bionica gemeldet." {n}Du hörst ein taktvoll verborgenes Unbehagen in der Stimme der Voxmeisterin.{/n} "Das Gesindel der unteren Decks hat die Ausgänge blockiert und verlangt Euer Kommen."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, la capitaine d'armes signale des troubles à proximité du secteur Bionica. » {n}Vous percevez une inquiétude savamment dissimulée dans la voix de la maîtresse-vox.{/n} « La populace des ponts inférieurs en a bloqué les accès et elle exige à présent que vous paraissiez devant elle. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, la capitaine d'armes signale des troubles à proximité du secteur Bionica. » {n}Vous percevez une inquiétude savamment dissimulée dans la voix de la maîtresse-vox.{/n} « La populace des ponts inférieurs en a bloqué les accès et elle exige à présent que vous paraissiez devant elle. »

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, la maestra de armas indica que hay disturbios en las inmediaciones del Sector Bionica». {n}La voz de la maestra de vocos disimula el desasosiego de forma casi total.{/n} «La chusma de las cubiertas inferiores ha bloqueado las salidas y exige que se presente ante ellos».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the Master-at-Arms has reported disturbances in the vicinity of the Sector Bionica." {n}You hear the tactfully disguised disquiet in the Vox Master's voice.{/n} "The rabble from the lower decks have blocked the exits, demanding that you appear before them."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, la maestra de armas indica que hay disturbios en las inmediaciones del Sector Bionica». {n}La voz de la maestra de vocos disimula el desasosiego de forma casi total.{/n} «La chusma de las cubiertas inferiores ha bloqueado las salidas y exige que se presente ante ellos».
